title: Test 3min — Fish Audio S2 Pro (~$0.06/ep, default voice for all)
description: Engine A/B test, identical script. Engine: Fish Audio S2 Pro (#1 on TTS-Arena2 leaderboard). NOTE: all 4 characters use Fish's default voice — testing engine quality, not character match. To get distinct voices we'd need to upload reference clips per character.
